chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No. 64 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case 13.08.2025 Mr. Shamshad Qureshi, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, DPG ---------- Counsel for applicant wishes to withdraw this transfer application as the learned Presiding Officer has been transferred. This Transfer Application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Ashraf
